reviews.comment:
Como siempre los baños limpios pero con deficiencias en el mantenimiento. Vuelcan escasa agua, se tira el papel higiénico en un tacho

(Translated by Google)
As always, the restrooms were clean but lacked maintenance. They use very little water, and toilet paper is thrown in the trash.
